title: Full-Cycle Demo and Lab
description: Complete capstone chapter integrating all commercial process elements into a real-world scenario

content.title: Full-Cycle Integrated Demo
content.subtitle: Apply everything you've learned to a realistic scenario

content.text: This final chapter brings together all the commercial process discipline you've learned: finding and qualifying customers, building proper structures, executing controlled selling, and maintaining leadership visibility. You'll work through a complete deal cycle from prospecting through close.

stages.label: 1. Identify & Qualify Opportunity
stages.description: Find the right customer fit and validate qualification criteria

stages.label: 2. Build Account Structure
stages.description: Map stakeholders and align account organization

stages.label: 3. Execute Controlled Sales
stages.description: Move through discovery, proposal, and negotiation phases

stages.label: 4. Secure Signature & Handoff
stages.description: Close the deal and transition to implementation with visibility

content.title: Lab: Integrated Deal Scenario
content.description: Work through a complete deal from start to finish

items: Every commercial cycle involves find, structure, sell, and lead disciplines
Each role (sales, account-manager, leadership) has specific responsibilities at each stage
Discipline at one stage prevents problems in later stages
Strong fundamentals lead to faster, more predictable revenue

keyTakeaways: Every commercial cycle involves find, structure, sell, and lead disciplines
Each role (sales, account-manager, leadership) has specific responsibilities at each stage
Discipline at one stage prevents problems in later stages
Strong fundamentals lead to faster, more predictable revenue
